macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Iran War Triggers Oil Supply Disruptions and Reprices Central Bank Rate Paths
items.summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has led to the most acute oil supply disruption in history, with Brent crude markets pricing longer-term disruptions. Central banks like the BoE and ECB now face multiple rate hikes instead of cuts, while long-term inflation expectations remain anchored.

items.title: IMF Downgrades Global Growth Outlook Due to Iran War
items.summary: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva stated the Fund was ready to upgrade global growth forecasts, but the Iran war has darkened the economic outlook amid widening gaps between rich and poor nations. Geopolitical tensions are compounding financing struggles for developing countries.

items.title: US Bond Market Shows Major Disconnect with Short and Long-Term Yields Diverging
items.summary: For the first time in years, short-term Treasury yields are falling while long-term yields rise, signaling concerns over growth, inflation, and debt sustainability. The Fed has started expanding its balance sheet again, planning $220 billion in bond purchases this year.

items.title: Experts Warn AI Stock Valuations and Private Credit Pose Financial Risks
items.summary: Discussions highlight uncertainties in AI stock valuations, data center investment booms, and the private credit market amid Middle East war uncertainties. While AI boosts productivity, current market pricing raises crash concerns similar to past bubbles.

items.title: Shelter Costs Drive Persistent Inflation Despite Falling Rents in Major Metros
items.summary: Asking rents dropped over 1.5% in February with growing apartment supply, but shelter costs—about a third of CPI—still rose 3% annually. Latest inflation data shows mixed trends not fully capturing regional rent declines.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: RaveDAO's RAVE Token Surges 86% in 24 Hours
items.summary: RaveDAO’s RAVE token surged 86% over the past 24 hours, reaching $2.07 with a market cap of $491 million and trading volume of $393 million, ranking it #102 by market cap.

items.title: Bitcoin Reclaims $73,000 but Traders Remain Skeptical
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied ~10% over the past week to $72,837 (up 0.34% in 24 hours), reclaiming $73,000 for the first time since mid-March, though derivatives traders show bearish positioning with rising short interest.

items.title: Privacy Coins Outperform Bitcoin and Ethereum with Massive Gains
items.summary: Zcash surged 49% to $371 and Dash 53% to $46 over the past week, outperforming Bitcoin's 8% rise to $72,727 and Ethereum's 9% to $2,244, amid endorsements from crypto leaders.

items.title: Hong Kong Grants First Stablecoin Issuer Licenses
items.summary: Hong Kong's HKMA approved Anchorpoint Financial and Hongkong and Shanghai Banking as the first stablecoin issuers under its new regulatory framework.

items.title: Crypto Futures See $103 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
items.summary: Crypto futures markets recorded approximately $103 million in liquidations in the past 24 hours amid heightened activity.

items.title: CROSS Token Surges 32% in 24 Hours
items.summary: CROSS token rose over 32% to $0.08 with trading volume exceeding $13 million in the past 24 hours.

items.title: Bitget Launches IPO Prime Platform for Pre-IPO Crypto Access
items.summary: Bitget introduced IPO Prime, offering retail investors access to pre-IPO assets like SpaceX-linked preSPAX, with airdrops starting April 13 and token distribution on April 21.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Releases Mythos AI Model Capable of Advanced Hacking and Vulnerability Detection
items.summary: Anthropic announced its new AI model, Mythos (also called Claude Mythos), which excels at writing complex software code and identifying vulnerabilities in popular systems better than humans. The company is partnering with tech giants and limiting release to firms securing critical software due to cybersecurity risks.

items.title: IMF Chief Voices Cybersecurity Concerns Over Anthropic's Mythos AI Model
items.summary: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva expressed concerns about cybersecurity risks from Anthropic's latest model, Claude Mythos, urging stronger guardrails to protect financial stability amid advancing AI.

items.title: Molotov Cocktail Thrown at OpenAI CEO's Home; 20-Year-Old Suspect Arrested
items.summary: Police arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a Molotov cocktail was thrown at the home of OpenAI's CEO, highlighting rising tensions around AI industry leaders.

items.title: Debate Intensifies on AI's Job Displacement Threat in the US
items.summary: Americans express anxiety over AI threatening jobs, with experts divided: some predict catastrophe while others call it hype, and data shows mixed impacts as companies invest heavily.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Multiple RTS Games Receive Updates, Demos, and Releases Including Crown of Greed Launch and Broken Arrow Free DLC
items.summary: A new video highlights recent RTS developments: Dust Front destruction mechanics update, Sanctuary: Shattered Sun multiplayer gameplay, Defcon Zero art progress, Age of Empires IV and Age of Mythology Retold new DLCs, Crown of Greed full release, and free DLC for Broken Arrow.

items.title: Warzone Season 3 Major Update Introduces New Best TTK Meta Loadout
items.summary: Call of Duty Warzone receives a significant update with a new top time-to-kill meta loadout, alongside mentions of supply drops returning and a surprise update with new weapons and Modern Warfare news.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
